name: Multiview Full Body Profile
description: Generates a character turnaround reference sheet: full-body front, left profile, right profile, and back views of the same character in one image, rendered in a selectable artistic style. Describe the character in 'prompt' and pick a 'style' from the list.

prompt.description: Character description (e.g. 'a young elf ranger with braided silver hair, green hooded cloak, leather armor, longbow on back').

options: heavy black ink illustration, high contrast noir comic style
painterly fantasy concept art, oil texture
western comic book style, bold inks and halftone shading
pastel children's book illustration, gentle colors
dark gritty graphic novel style, muted palette
style.default: painterly fantasy concept art, oil texture

negative_prompt.description: Elements to avoid (default: 'text, watermark, blurry, inconsistent character, different characters').

width.description: Image width in pixels (default: 1408 — wide enough for four figures).

defaults.negative_prompt: text, watermark, blurry, inconsistent character, different characters
